summary: Completed comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Images Module (media assets, repository, AI generation, Buffer GraphQL integration). All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Images page with 3 tabs works correctly, Export page with Buffer publishing button present, Profiles page with Buffer channel selector functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Buffer profile selector shows 'Nessun canale associato' as expected since Buffer account has 0 channels connected - this is expected per the testing context, not a product bug
Auto-assign images card appears in workflow step 6 (Revisione) when posts exist - verified via code review at WorkflowPage.js:562
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed media assets for testing (TEST_upload_image, TEST_processed_image, TEST_repository_image)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Images module fully tested. Backend tests cover: media assets CRUD, upload with auto-process, repository images upload/index/import, AI generation job start, media processing jobs, image assignments API, Buffer GraphQL profiles endpoint, export CSV/JSON with media fields. Frontend verified: Images page 3 tabs (Carica da PC, Repository immagini, Genera con AI), 16 media assets in library, Export page Buffer publishing CTA, Profiles page Buffer channel selector. Buffer has 0 channels in the configured account which is expected per main agent context.

features_verified.sidebar_images_menu: PASS - Immagini menu item visible in Studio sidebar under CONTENUTI section

features_verified.images_3_tabs: PASS - Carica da PC / Repository immagini / Genera con AI tabs all present and functional
features_verified.upload_image_library: PASS - Upload form works, creates asset with public_url
features_verified.public_url_accessible: PASS - Public URLs accessible without auth, returns image content-type
features_verified.repository_images: PASS - Upload, index, list, import to library all working
features_verified.ai_generation: PASS - Generation job starts (API returns job_id and asset_id)
features_verified.workflow_auto_assign_card: EXISTS - Code verified at WorkflowPage.js:562 - appears in step 6 Revisione when posts exist
features_verified.assignments_api: PASS - GET /api/media/assignments returns list, filters by campaign_id
features_verified.export_buffer_cta: PASS - 'Pubblica approvati su Buffer' button present in Export page
features_verified.export_csv_json_media: PASS - CSV/JSON exports include media fields
features_verified.profiles_buffer_selector: PASS - Buffer channel selector present in profile dialog
features_verified.buffer_profiles_graceful: PASS - /api/buffer/profiles returns 200 with empty array (0 channels - expected)
